markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and refine proposed content clusters for CRV's SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Clusters Approved:** "VC Selection & Due Diligence," "Series A Preparation," and "Technical Founder Resources."](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [**Clusters Merged:** "Investor Partnership Value" and "Board Governance" will combine into a single, comprehensive "Building & Running Your Board" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [**New AI Cluster:** A new cluster on "AI-Native Companies" will be developed to capture founders building the next generation of AI, not those integrating it into legacy products.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
  - [**Realistic Expectations:** The engagement will target \~100 keywords in the content OS, aiming for 2-4k total keywords ranked within 6 months, not the 800k+ of competitors like YC.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)

## Topics

### SEO & Content Strategy

  - [**Competitive Analysis:** A quick check of top search results (e.g., Reddit, Medium) for a keyword indicates low competition from major VCs, signaling a strong opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Keyword Difficulty (KD):** This metric measures how hard it is to rank for a keyword.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [**"Best VC Firms":** KD 43 (Medium) → Pursue.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [**"Venture Capital":** KD 73 (Extremely Hard) → Avoid, as top results are dominated by high-authority sites like Investopedia and Harvard Business Review.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

### Content Cluster Review

  - [**1. VC Selection & Due Diligence (Approved)**](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
      - [**Goal:** Help founders pick the right partner.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Low competition from other VCs; covers both seed and Series A.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [**2. Series A Preparation (Approved)**](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
      - [**Goal:** Guide founders on preparing for Series A.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Targets founders *before* they are actively fundraising, creating an earlier touchpoint.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**3. Investor Partnership Value & Board Governance (Merged)**](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
      - [**Issue:** The keyword "investor relations" is ambiguous (founder-VC vs. VC-LP).](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
      - [**Solution:** Merge clusters 4 & 5 into one focused on "Building & Running Your Board."](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
      - [**New Focus:** Practical guidance for founders on board selection, operations, and evolution.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [**Caveat:** Ensure content is founder-focused, not for junior investors.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [**4. Technical Founder Resources (Approved)**](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build brand visibility with technical founders *before* they seek funding.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Establishes CRV as a thought leader for its ideal customer profile at the earliest stages of their journey.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [**5. AI-Native Companies (New)**](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A critical omission, as AI is a top investment focus for CRV.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
      - [**Angle:** Target founders building new, AI-native companies (e.g., Periodic Labs, Skilled AI), not those integrating AI into legacy products.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Use a technical thought-leadership approach (e.g., "Leveraging the ChatGPT API") to attract the right founder profile, integrating CRV founder stories.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

### Project Scope & Expectations

  - [**Content OS:** \~100 keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=2018.0)
  - [**Sprint Output:** 18–20 articles (5/week for the final 4 weeks).](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=2072.0)
  - [**6-Month Target:** 2,000–4,000 total keywords ranked.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=2018.0)
  - [**Author Attribution:** All content will be attributed to "Team CRV" to build a collective brand, not individual investor profiles.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1987.0)
      - [Merge "Investor Partnership Value" & "Board Governance" clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
      - [Research and develop the new "AI-Native Companies" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
      - [Send the "How to Evaluate if a VC is founder-friendly" calibration article.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=2166.0)
      - [Ping Alexis for a working link to the James & Vega interview video.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [**Palo Alto Four:**](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)
      - [Send William links to CRV's AI-native portfolio companies (e.g., Periodic Labs, Skilled AI).](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
      - [Send William the relevant paragraph from Murat's Midas list bio for context.](https://fathom.video/share/zo95mBp-jbzVR7suW52NsbN-i65U3M4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)
